        "added": {
            "follow": false,
            "setting4": "blah blah",
            "setting5": {
                "key5": "value5"
            }
        },
        "setting1": "Value 1",
        "removed": {
            "setting2": 200
        },
        "updated": {
            "setting3": {
                "old": true,
                "new": null
            }
        },
        "setting6": {
            "doge": {
                "updated": {
                    "wow": {
                        "old": "",
                        "new": "so much"
                    }
                }
            },
            "key": "value",
            "added": {
                "ops": "vops"
            }
        }
    },

        "updated": {
            "baz": {
                "old": "bas",
                "new": "bars"
            },
            "nest": {
                "old": {
                    "key": "value"
                },
                "new": "str"
            }
        },
        "foo": "bar"
    },

        "group2": {
            "abc": 12345,
            "deep": {
                "id": 45
            }
        }
    },
    "added": {
        "group3": {
            "deep": {
                "id": {
                    "number": 45
                }
            },
            "fee": 100500
        }
    }
